name: kb-factory-tools
description: KB Factory plugins for local-first, append-only knowledge-base workflows. Distributes kb-lifecycle (KB runtime + wiki maintenance), session-gate (session boundary wrapper), and kb-wiki-vnext (thin-memory harness) for Claude Code and Claude Cowork.

plugins.name: kb-lifecycle
plugins.description: KB lifecycle and wiki maintenance plugin. Use when a project has a `.kb/` directory and needs session bootstrap, source ingestion, or wiki refresh.

plugins.name: session-gate
plugins.description: Thin session-boundary wrapper for Claude Cowork workspaces. Operational workaround for Cowork's missing automatic plugin hooks; provides explicit /session-start and /session-end commands that route to KB-lifecycle canonical surfaces.

plugins.name: kb-wiki-vnext
plugins.description: KB/Wiki vNext thin-memory harness for Claude Code and Cowork. Starts with session-start, loads only .kb-next/memory/NOW.md by default, and keeps .kb canonical.
